# ona_project_insights (Resource)

Project-level Ona Insights enablement. Deleting this resource disables Insights and removes its associated workflow.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ona_project_insights" "api" {
  project_id = ona_project.api.id
  enabled    = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) ID of the project whose Insights enablement is managed.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether Insights is enabled for the project.

### Read-Only

- `data_collected_through` (String) RFC3339 upper bound of the most recent successfully collected Insights data.
- `id` (String) Project Insights resource ID, equal to the project ID.
- `last_ran_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the Insights workflow last completed successfully.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
#!/usr/bin/env sh

terraform import ona_project_insights.api 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000
```
